title: BCCL – Executive Programme exam passed Trainee – 2 Posts

basic_details.job_title: BCCL Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Bharat Coking Coal Limited (BCCL) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Executive Programme exam passed Trainee (Practical Training of Company Secretary). Candidates with ICSI Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 26-05-2026, and closes on 16-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through BCCL official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Passed Executive program and completed the Executive Development Programme from Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BCCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
